title: Honkai Star Rail as Firefly
description: Firefly can play Minecraft Adventure with Explore and Fight with Monsters.
body:
A Honkai Star Rail as Play Firefly on Minecraft for Forge 1.20

What that mod?
It's character as Firefly from Honkai Star Rail can play minecraft, Firefly can transform to SAM from Stelle Hunters.

Firefly AKA Sam can kill every thems as mobs and modded mobs.

> Features:
> 
> Firefly can explore on minecraft
> 
> SAM can kill them every mobs and modded mobs.
> 
> SAM is strongest and overpower.
> 


> **How to control?**
> 
> Z - Firefly transform into a SAM
> 
> X - Basic Attack and SAM Basic Attack and Extra Attack
> 
> C - Skill and SAM's Skill can Attack and Explosive
> 


**Need help for issue?**

You can post about issue. Link: https://github.com/shiranui09/hsrfirefly/issues



> **FAQ:**
> 
> Q: You can make another version and fabric?
> 
> A: I will not make it
> 
> 
> Q: I can use modpacks? 
> 
> A: of course, I allow you
